programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.desc: Parker expands to a second cut and puts his trust in a rookie foreman. Tony battles the cursed cut. Rick fires up his plant on rich ground. Greenhorn Fred Lewis calls in a mining legend. The miners reveal their secrets for striking it rich gold mining.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bet Big to Win Big
programme.desc: Rick bets nearly all his gold on a new machine that could transform his season. Tony resurrects an abandoned secret weapon. Parker ramps up production. The Dakota Boys haul in their first gold in record time. Parker's crew joins The Dirt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Dirt: A New Attitude
programme.desc: Parker lays out his new mine boss philosophy and Mitch and Brennan weigh in. The Ness crew explains how less laughs might equal more gold. Kruse starts a side career as a talk show host. Fred Hurt at 77 explains why he has no intention of slowing down.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Big Bowl Bet
programme.desc: After a great start, thick clay in the pay dirt clogs the sluice, forcing Dave Turin and his crew to quickly troubleshoot the land and get the operation back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bet Big to Win Big

programme.desc: As gold prices spike to record highs and the cost of fuel plummets, Parker, Rick and Tony race to take advantage of the perfect conditions. But after the worldwide lockdown delayed the start of the season, there's less time than ever to cash in.

programme.desc: Drew searches for 'fresh to market' items, pieces that dealers haven't seen yet. His hunt takes him to the Cotswolds for a stash of Indian and Afghan treasures and finally to an old factory filled with industrial objects never seen by any dealer.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Max Hits
programme.desc: Drew scores a huge farmhouse table from a wholesaler in Exeter, then heads to North London to visit one of his best-kept secrets before taking off for Herefordshire to a busy antiques center where he spies an early Victorian whatnot.

programme.desc: For the first time in 'World Detour' history, Kelly heads the trip. This time it's to Nashville, Tennessee. Jack and Ozzy are backseat to some very 'Kelly' activities such as brunch with drag queens and a visit to the wax museum.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Lizard of Oz
programme.desc: With Pearl in tow, Ozzy and Jack head to Alabama where Jack's childhood dream will be fulfilled at Huntsville's Space Camp. Ozzy has a surprise up his sleeve for Jack. It's a visit with Dave Turner, the Rock and Roll Redneck.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Season of the Kitsch
programme.desc: In Victorville, Brandi and Jarrod's mischievous side emerges. Ivy grabs a locker that no one else can tolerate, while Mary puts the new guy in his place.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Surprisingly Doughy
programme.desc: Find out why Julian McCullough wants to build a wall, what Jade Catta-Preta thinks about Julian's midsection, and which celebrity Matteo Lane knows all about.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: America's Least Wanted
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau knows exactly what millennials say, Cipha Sounds has a surprising favorite dance move, and Shane Torres explains what makes Cipha different from other DJs.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: The Show Got Cancelled
programme.desc: Find out why Amir K would suck as a realtor, how Brad Williams gets Amish people to worship him, and how Mark Normand nearly gets the show cancelled.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Chicken Heads
programme.desc: Jessimae Peluso does a great impression of God, Matteo Lane has sage advice for when life gives you chicken heads, and Josh Wolf nails Matteo's celebrity look-a-like.

programme.title: Las Vegas: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts an environmentally friendly conference. When Delinda tries to go green at home, Danny puts up a fight.

programme.desc: Danny finds it difficult to keep up with the job, when he gets a surprise visit from the fire marshal and his alcoholic uncle.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The High Price of Gas

programme.title: Las Vegas: The High Price of Gas

programme.title: Las Vegas: A Cannon Carol
programme.desc: The casino staffers are busy making holiday plans, except Mike, who begins to doubt his place in Vegas, as well as in his friends' lives. A modern day Scrooge, Sam invites a client to come to the casino for the holidays.

programme.title: Las Vegas: I Could Eat a Horse
programme.desc: Danny and Mike head to Wyoming to buy a horse that Cooper wants to add to his ranch but this isn't as easy as they thought. Back at the casino, Delinda tries to find a new chef for the restaurant.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 3 Babies, 100 Guns and a Fat Chick
programme.desc: When a fugitive arrives at the Montecito, FBI agents and bounty hunters hope to make a capture. Mike, Danny and Cooper step in, and end up fighting for their lives. Also, Piper throws a post-New Year's Eve party.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Secrets, Lies and Lamaze
programme.desc: Piper gets himself in trouble with the gaming commission, but Cooper bails her out to the tune of $1-million, making the staffers suspicious of his actions. Sam and manicurist Polly get caught speeding and sentenced to traffic school.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast
programme.desc: Sam helps her 'whales' destroy any evidence that they went to a strip club. Meanwhile, Mike and Piper try to lure a hot new bartender to work at the Montecito. Elsewhere, Cooper challenges Danny to find ways to bring in more clientele.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 2 on 2
programme.desc: Piper's skills are put to the test when she is nominated for the 'Concierge of the Year' award. Meanwhile, Danny and Mike find themselves in over their heads upon entering a 2 on 2-basketball competition.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Win, Place, Bingo
programme.desc: Cooper, Danny and Mike are suspicious of a guy named Pete Skinner who is betting on horses and has a seemingly perfect winning streak. Meanwhile, Sam's 'whale' brings his grandmother 'Robby' with him to the casino.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Solutions
programme.desc: Join Terry Bradshaw and his family as they navigate life.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Problems
programme.desc: Terry’s eldest daughter Rachel’s new real estate career needs help, Lacey’s husband doesn’t want to move to Texas and Erin has been keeping a secret from him about a recent change to her appearance.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Terry Is in a Jam

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Mr. Wrong

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Terry is invited to Washington D.C. to sing with Rob Gronkowski at the USO. While he brings his family along to meet the troops, Rachel gets her mojo back and falls for a marine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Flavor
programme.desc: Guy travels the South to try the unique flavours and authentic favourites from the region.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sauced and Spiced
programme.desc: Guy heads to Tennessee for a traditional Mediterranean lamb dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hitting the Grill
programme.desc: Guy samples foods straight off the grill, including a burger joint in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ultimate Turkey Fest
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's gobbling up Thanksgiving with an hour of talking turkey. From Boston to California to Wisconsin to Florida, he's digging into everything from the traditional dinner to turducken and turkey-shaped bread loaves.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pierogis, Pork and Pizza
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diving into all kinds of off-the-hook flavors on this trip. In Hollywood, Fla., a sandwich shop servin' up a terrific taste of Peru. A pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin', Chillin' and Huli Huli Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is heading to unique grills on the mainland. The first stop is a husband a wife duo serving up classic Americana with a 21st century twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Trottin' Out the Turkey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checkin' out Flavortown's all-time turkey-centric spots. At a Boston diner, Guy reminisces about the Thanksgiving plate he had in 2007. Then, in New Orleans, traditional turkey gets the French Quarter flair.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, Calif., a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, Mich., the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pierogis, Pork and Pizza
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diving into all kinds of off-the-hook flavors on this trip. In Hollywood, Fla., a sandwich shop servin' up a terrific taste of Peru. A pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin', Chillin' and Huli Huli Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is heading to unique grills on the mainland. The first stop is a husband a wife duo serving up classic Americana with a 21st century twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal BBQ
programme.desc: Guy seeks out authentic barbecue restaurants around the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels from the east coast to the southwest in search of regional specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Memphis Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: While in Memphis, Guy samples pulled pork sandwiches and barbecue spaghetti.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hunts down some seriously good food with visits to Baltimore, Minnesota, and Mississippi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Party
programme.desc: Guy's roundin' up the ultimate pizza party all over the nation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Back to the Beginning
programme.desc: Get ready to open the vault for the hour that started it all, the very first Triple-D episode ever. Only this time, it's reloaded with plenty of extras from Guy himself, about his original trip through Flavortown.

programme.title: Martina's Table: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With her entire family home for Thanksgiving, country music superstar Martina McBride shares some of her favourite recipes inspired by her Kansas roots. Her holiday menu includes sausage, cherry and cornbread stuffing and candied pecans.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Thankful For Family
programme.desc: When it comes to Thanksgiving Valerie really knows how to bring the people she loves together. She and Tom host both of their families for a Thanksgiving feast to remember.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Turkey Day Tricks
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts give away their best Turkey Day tricks and recipes including Geoffrey Zakarian's bone-in turkey breast with lemon caper sauce.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Family and Friends Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Giada hosts a festive Thanksgiving for family and friends. The guests enjoy a menu of braised turkey braciole, bacon stuffing with radicchio and chestnuts, Brussel sprouts agrodolce and parmesan apple pie.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Giada's Turkey Day Feast
programme.desc: Giada is ready to pull off a seamless, stress-free Thanksgiving with feast plans beginning three days in advance. Her make-ahead menu features lemon and pea alfredo, sweet and savory kale salad, prosciutto-wrapped turkey and mascarpone cannoli cheesecake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Perfect as Pie
programme.desc: Ree Drummond proves that the pie's the limit with four irresistibly easy pie recipes. She makes a drunken pecan pie, a coconut cream pie with shortcuts, a cranberry and cherry cobbler pie and a super fast cast iron blueberry and nectarine galette.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Thanksgiving Shortcuts
programme.desc: Ree is sneaking a few store-bought shortcuts into her make-ahead Thanksgiving feast. First is her epic make ahead Thanksgiving turkey, which is cooked and portioned in advance. She makes doctored up dressing and gussied up gravy to go alongside it.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Turkey Day To-Do List
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts get ready for the big turkey day with a to-do list. Geoffrey Zakarian makes his picture perfect whole roasted turkey with sumac, lemon and thyme, plus gravy.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Dishes That Keep Giving
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes the most of a free day by preparing dishes that make perfect leftovers. First up is chicken pot pie, and she makes plenty of cheesy country ham grit balls with spicy mayo and some pan-roasted sage and butternut squash.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Giving Thanks and Giving Back
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, return to Nashville Food Project, a local nonprofit that farms and feeds Nashville's local communities, to use fall crops from the community garden in a meal for the staff and farmers.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Turkey Day Tournament
programme.desc: The first round has a Thanksgiving feast to prepare and in the next round, the chefs use leftovers to create something special, an upscale dinner. Included in this episode is the fall edition of Grocery Bowl.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Thanksgiving in Flavortown
programme.desc: Four chefs are fixin' for a Thanksgiving in Flavortown. First, they must make a regional Thanksgiving dinner using only seven pounds of ingredients. Next, the chefs have only 15 minutes to whip up a party plate for unexpected houseguests.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Thanksgiving Grocery Trot
programme.desc: Four chefs get their basters ready for this Thanksgiving episode. The chefs find autumn staples, which they must incorporate to their inventive fall dishes.

programme.title: Good Bones: Mina's East Street Investment
programme.desc: Mina and Steve think it's time to renovate a rental property they purchased three years ago so they can sell it for Jack's college fund. Karen and Mina formulate a plan to transform the house into an urban Hampton's retreat with marble and wood shingles.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Mansion for Mom

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Follow Your Nose

programme.title: Southern Charm: Step and Release

programme.title: Southern Charm: Craig of All Trades, Master of None
programme.desc: Cameran turns to the supernatural in hopes of finding her life's purpose, while Thomas takes a leap of faith by asking Landon out on a date. Naomie reaches her boiling point when she learns of Craig's latest endeavor.

programme.title: Southern Charm: To Liver and Die in Charleston
programme.desc: After going to the doctor, Shep receives some shocking news about his health, causing him to take a step back from his party-boy ways. Love is in the air as Austen and Chelsea deepen their romantic bond.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Fowl Play
programme.desc: As Kathryn contemplates a reunion with the father of her children, Patricia continues to push Landon and Thomas closer together. Craig and Naomie attempt to reconcile after their latest blow up, and Shep plans a hunting getaway for the group.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Guess Who's Coming to Lunch

programme.title: Southern Charm: The Hangover

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Pharaohs' Curse
programme.desc: According to legend, an ancient curse was placed upon the tomb of King Tutankhamun. When the tomb was opened in 1922, a series of terrible events occurred. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest that The Pharaoh’s Curse was put in place to protect the truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: An in depth look at the life and crimes of master manipulator, and monster, Drew Peterson. Peterson is currently serving time for the murder of his third wife while the search for his fourth wife Stacy continues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Comic Book Murder
programme.desc: Barbara George was murdered in her comic store on Friday the 13th. The case went cold and her husband moved away, starting a new life with a new wife. But then there was a new prosecutor with an old connection to the case, and he wanted it solved.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: The BTK Serial Killer
programme.desc: Self-named killer B.T.K., murdered 10 people over 17 years all while taunting Wichita police and media before being exposed as family man and churchgoer, Dennis Rader. In an exclusively acquired interview, he reveals what drove him to do it.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Tupac Shakur
programme.desc: Tupac and Biggie once friends, became embroiled in a collision course that ended in tragedy. Loved ones and insiders give personal accounts of the pivotal six day period between Tupac's shooting and his tragic death.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Aileen Wuornos
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the complexities of the case against the woman branded as America’s first female serial killer. Questions still revolve around her claim of self-defense and whether or not she got the justice she deserved.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: In the 70’s, Ted Bundy brutally murdered at least 36 young women. Glamorized as a handsome, well-educated killer who outsmarted the law, was Bundy really an evil genius… or a con artist posing as privileged to hide the monster in plain sight.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Charles Cullen
programme.desc: Nurse Charles Cullen is one of America's most prolific serial killers. Police say he may have murdered up to 400 victims, Cullen claimed he acted mercifully to end their pain. An in-depth look into the case reveals the truth behind his motives.

programme.title: Dateline: Betrayal of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: When Brett Parker returned to his home in Charlston SC, he discovered the dead bodies of his beloved wife and her friend. At first, it seemed like a robbery gone wrong. However, a closer look at the clues reveals a much darker twisted tale.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County: The King of Orange County

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Vegetarian

programme.title: The Simpsons: King-Size Homer
programme.desc: Homer tries everything to get out of the plant's new exercise program and discovers that being on disability would do just that. He sets out to gain 61 pounds in order to be able to work from home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mother Simpson
programme.desc: After faking his own death, Homer discovers that his mother is alive. He brings her home to meet the family and learns that she is on the run from the law. Her old nemesis, Mr. Burns, alerts the cops to her whereabouts, forcing her to leave once again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sideshow Bob's Last Gleaming
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob escapes from prison, steals a bomb and hides out in a blimp. When he threatens to detonate a bomb, the town gives in to his only demand and ceases production of all television shows.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons 138th Episode Spectacular

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Be Not Proud

programme.title: The Simpsons: Team Homer

programme.title: The Simpsons: Scenes From a Class Struggle in Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Fink

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World
programme.desc: Chris unearths a whirlwind wedding ceremony, some exploding rocks and a woman's twin inside her brain.

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World
programme.desc: Chris discovers the secrets behind a flame-filled firenado, unearths a very bizarre looking living rock and meets a team of oversized rats who save lives.

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: How It's Made: Car Tires; Silk; Art Conservation; Scuba Tanks
programme.desc: Learn how car tires, silk, art conservation and scuba tanks are made.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Renewable Energy
programme.desc: Powering our world requires innovative, truly renewable energy resources. New Field Reporter Darieth Chisolm heads to Southern California to investigate biogas and hydrogen batteries powerful enough to run a city bus.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Where Is Baby DeOrr?
programme.desc: A young couple enjoys an impromptu camping trip in Leadore, Idaho, until their 2-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators and private detectives work around the clock to find the missing boy, only to point the finger back at the parents.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer
programme.desc: A Philadelphia woman disappears in the fall of 1977. Later, police come to learn the terrifying truth about her whereabouts, but struggle to locate and bring in her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Manhunt
programme.desc: When loving couple Gary and Linda Haas fail to reach their vacation campsite, New Mexico State Police are called in to investigate. With no forensic evidence and no witnesses, all they can do is scour CCTV footage for clues to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Sierra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Sierra LaMar leaves for school like any other day, only to disappear without a trace. Surveillance footage helps reveal if she is just another typical runaway or if something a lot worse happens to Sierra.

programme.title: See No Evil: Where's Mom?
programme.desc: Shirley Shell is a loving wife and the dedicated mother of three children and two grandchildren. But on June 3rd, 2007, Shirley is found brutally murdered at home in Edmond, Oklahoma. The rush is on to search security footage to help hunt down the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a 14-year-old girl vanishes without a trace on her way to school. Her parents have no idea where she could be. Investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage, but are unsure if they will find her before its too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Night Shift
programme.desc: 18-year-old Kyle Farishian is working the late shift at a 7-Eleven on Halloween when he is brutally attacked by a masked assailant. With no physical evidence, detectives scrutinize the convenience store's surveillance footage for any clues.

programme.title: The Last 24: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: When Diane Holik's body is discovered in her Texas home, detectives are faced with one of the most pristine crime scenes they've ever encountered. They unearth multiple suspects, but only the victim's reconstructed timeline can identify the killer.

programme.title: The Last 24: Unforgivable Sin
programme.desc: Popular newlyweds Rick and Gail Brink are shot execution-style in their Michigan home. But it will take 25 years before investigators uncover a flaw in the timeline that convinces them of the killer's guilt.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Robert Blake
programme.desc: He was a famous Hollywood actor. She was his wife. Some said she was also a con artist. Then Bonny Lee Bakley was found murdered in their car.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Mexico With My Kids
programme.desc: In 2009, Valerie Castellano robbed a bank in rural Indiana and fled with her children and girlfriend to Mexico.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Underground
programme.desc: Toby Young escaped to Mexico through drug tunnels and learned the true cost of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Mexico With My Kids
programme.desc: In 2009, Valerie Castellano robbed a bank in rural Indiana and fled with her children and girlfriend to Mexico.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best grilled dishes in restaurants across America. He's hanging out in the kitchens of fire-loving chefs to learn everything there is to know about applying heat and smoke for the tastiest chicken, beef, and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Beddy Bye/ The Grass Is Always Greener
programme.desc: Timmy always falls asleep at 9 p.m., so he wishes for a world without sleep, much to the chagrin of the human race and the Sandman. Timmy runs away to become a carnie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Love at First Bark / Desperate Without Housewives
programme.desc: Dad forbids Sparky from dating Dinkleberg's new dog. Timmy wishes Dad would like the dog as much as Sparky. When Mom won't stop nagging Timmy and Dad, Timmy wishes all women away for one day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Engine Blocked/ Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet the Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy's Dad goes through a mid-life crisis, he invests every ounce of his free time into rebuilding the sports car of his dreams.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Can't Spy Me Love
programme.desc: After seeing a cute guy but missing her chance to meet him, Phoebe accesses the Hero League's villain search software to track him down. However, Phoebe's abuse of power leads to unexpected consequences for her crush.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Stealing Home
programme.desc: Hank and Phoebe think the house has been robbed when they return home and discover the furniture missing, but Max admits he hid everything and forces them to earn their belongings back before Barb discovers the truth.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: CupQuake vs. Red
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas' Birthday Clip-O-Rama!
programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Invasion of the Ferb Snatchers/ Ain't No Kiddie Ride
programme.desc: After an all night science-fiction movie marathon, Candace is convinced that Ferb is an alien and gathers evidence to prove it. The boys admit that they are doing something for an alien but that Ferb is not one.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Stage! Facing Aiger!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The One that Didn't Get Away!
programme.desc: What starts as an ordinary fishing expedition turns into a much bigger adventure than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show
programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma
programme.desc: Tilly and Remy put on a sidewalk play while Cricket and Bill meet their favorite costumed superheroes. Cricket and Tilly try to keep Gramma at home while she recovers from eye surgery.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock

programme.desc: Pam concocts a plan to get a job at Martin's old friend's recording company.

programme.title: Martin: Stake-Out
programme.desc: After the police ask Pam if they can use her apartment for a stake-out, Martin decides to catch the criminal himself so he can earn the $100,000 reward.

programme.title: Living Single: A Hair-Razing Experience
programme.desc: Kyle's promotion may hinge on a more conservative haircut.

programme.title: Living Single: There's No Ship Like Kinship
programme.desc: Khadijah becomes jealous when her old childhood friend spends more time with Synclaire.

programme.title: Living Single: Singing the Blues
programme.desc: Kyle fears that he still has feelings for Max; Regine coaches Khadijah for a TV interview.

programme.title: Living Single: Play Ball
programme.desc: Khadijah hires pro baseball player and New York Met, Bobby Bonilla to write a column.

programme.title: Living Single: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Overton and Regine get caught in a blizzard after he picks her up at the boutique.

programme.title: Living Single: The Last Temptation
programme.desc: A handsome young man from Synclaire's psychology class kisses her during a study session.

programme.title: Living Single: Legal Briefs
programme.desc: Maxine's new boss is an old flame.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour
programme.desc: A Hong Kong police inspector is paired with an L.A. detective to investigate a kidnapping.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Snow Bride
programme.desc: A reporter pretends to be the girlfriend of the son of a famous politician to help him save face over Christmas. She becomes torn between exposing newsworthy scoops about the famous family and trusting that she's falling in love for real.

programme.title: Movie: A Timeless Christmas
programme.desc: Charles Whitley travels from 1903 to 2020 where he meets Megan Turner and experiences a 21st Century Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: A Nashville Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A television producer is forced to work with the man who broke her heart on a country music Christmas special while being interrupted by Christmas spirits determined for her to revisit her past.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Vienna
programme.desc: Jess, a concert violinist who has lost her passion, visits Vienna for Christmas. There she finds the inspiration she has been missing with an American diplomat and his children.

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome bachelor sees his life change before his eyes when he adopts a stray cat.

programme.title: Movie: Sharing Christmas
programme.desc: A real estate developer is given the opportunity to transform an old shopping complex into a prime location. Unfortunately, there is one tenant who is holding out, the Christmas shop owner he met just days earlier.

programme.title: Movie: A Cookie Cutter Christmas
programme.desc: Two long-time rival school teachers duke it out during the holidays in a bake-off. With both determined to win the prize, their competitiveness could jeopardize what matters most this Christmas season.

programme.title: Movie: Double Holiday
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with throwing her companies holiday party, with her nemesis. The two must work together to mingle work and traditions to make the party a success.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is whisked away to Europe when her boyfriend reveals he's actually a prince.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Club
programme.desc: Two busy strangers are thrown together to help an elderly woman recover her lost savings. While working together, the magic of the season prevails, leading the couple to discover something they have been missing, love.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under the Stars
programme.desc: A man loses his job right before Christmas, so he takes a temporary job selling trees. While at work, he meets a woman and her son, who are dealing with the sudden loss of her father. The two get to talking, and out of their loss, love grows.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II

programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.desc: The town of South Park is gentrifying and Kenny thinks it's time to get a job.

programme.title: South Park: Pee

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000

programme.desc: A woman inherits a year-round Christmas store in a small town.

programme.desc: A woman returns home to help the family poinsettia farm in the rush before Christmas.

programme.desc: A well-known social media travel writer is given the assignment to cover a hundred-year-old Christmas parade in a small town, where she meets a high school music teacher who introduces her to a side of Christmas that she has never seen.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance
programme.desc: When a Tennessee man is shot down in front of his own home, police use home video to unravel the history of a vicious feud between rural neighbours and determine if the shooting was self-defence or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deadly Trespass
programme.desc: When a wealthy neighbor begins buying up Montana land and restricting access to the public mountain trails beyond, one man cuts the locks and ends up dead.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.
