programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Pinsetter Mechanic
programme.desc: Mike travels to Fremont, CA, to help maintain a bowling centre. Then he responds to a letter from one of his fans who wants to see more footage of cameraman Doug.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Locomotive Builder
programme.desc: Mike heads to MotivePower in Boise, Idaho to build and restore locomotives for his 200th dirty job.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Woolen Mill Operator
programme.desc: Mike spends a day working at Ohio Valley Natural Fibers where he makes yarn from fleece. Then he goes to work at a day spa in Michigan where he helps wax hair off of his good friend Barsky.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Water Softener Technician
programme.desc: Mike travels to Moorhead, Minnesota, to work as a water softener technician. Then he heads to the Westin St. Francis hotel in San Francisco where he takes on the job of a coin washer.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mattress Recycler
programme.desc: Mike heads to Miami to recover and crush abandoned boats and then he recycles mattresses in San Francisco.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Barber's Assistant/ Landfill Operator
programme.desc: In Mobile, Alabama, Mike studies old school tricks to cutting hair with a local barber. Mike then stops by the Ostrom Road Landfill in California.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Detective
programme.desc: Mike joins the team at Purdue University's DECOMP Forensic Entomology Lab as they dig through pig carcasses searching for maggots and other insects.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tower Top Hand
programme.desc: Mike help erect a radio tower in North Dakota. Mike is commemorated in Hollywood for doing a dirty job in each of the 50 states.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Camel Rancher
programme.desc: Mike heads to a unique dairy farm in Ramona, CA where he learns how to milk, care for and breed dromedary camels.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Horse Tester
programme.desc: Mike travels to Kentucky Equine Research Facility to assist with testing athletic horses. His duties include helping with blood testing during a fitness test and checking pH levels in fresh poo.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Toilet Crusher
programme.desc: Mike heads to Arkansas to perform tests on Alligator Snapping Turtles, the he heads to San Francisco where he removes and recycles toilets.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rocky Reach Dam
programme.desc: Mike heads out to Wenatchee, Washington to help maintain a hydroelectric dam. He then explores a fish bypass system where he must tag fish and winds up wading through poop.

programme.title: Flipped: A Mobster Tells All: Michael 'Mikey Flattop' DeRosa
programme.desc: When Mikey Flattop is caught he flips on the mob and helps police take down the mob.

programme.title: Flipped: A Mobster Tells All: Kenny 'Kenji' Gallo
programme.desc: Loyalty, honour, family meant nothing to Kenji. He simply loved living life dangerously. So when the FBI caught up with him, Kenji offered to fly to New York, wear a wire and bring down some of the heaviest hitters of the Colombo Crime Family.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Renewable Energy
programme.desc: Powering our world requires innovative, truly renewable energy resources. New Field Reporter Darieth Chisolm heads to Southern California to investigate biogas and hydrogen batteries powerful enough to run a city bus.

programme.title: The Elite Fishing League: Elimination Round 4 Yamaha Shoot Out
programme.desc: The Yamaha Shootout takes place.

programme.title: The Anglerschannel Bass Wrap Up Show: Episode 3 ACBWS-3 October
programme.desc: The AC cameras are at Lake Hartwell for the Carhartt College series. Learn about Carolina Rigs on Smith Lake in Alabama, and get gear reviews from Strike King.

programme.title: Ocean Legacy: Deep in Key West
programme.desc: Capt. Robert Trosset does deep-drop action west of Key West.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: The Captain
programme.desc: John Jackson and crew head to Venice, Louisiana with Capt. Brent Roy.

programme.title: Gold Rush: It's Alive
programme.desc: Rick bets nearly all his gold on a new machine that could transform his operation. Tony resurrects an abandoned secret weapon. Parker hires new crew members to make up for lost time.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Come Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A late start to the season shortens their mining window and with record snowfall melt the crew faces the most dangerous conditions ever. Dustin picks up right where he left off at Rockfall Ravine, while Fred's future diving for gold lies in the balance.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Good as Gold
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys race against time and put their new crew members to the test to rebuild their mine sites and haul heavy equipment to the Trifecta and Rockfall Ravine. Their first dive is golden and promises a successful season.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Don't Push It!
programme.desc: Two patients with gunshot wounds share a shocking connection. A jogger slips into a coma but has no ID and the ER must track down her next of kin.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Drywall/ Shower Drain Hair Collector
programme.desc: Evan has spent the last six years sneaking into bathrooms because he is addicted to collecting shower drain hair. And Nicole has spent the last seven years secretly breaking apart walls to feed her addiction: eating drywall.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Extreme Hair/ Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her 10-pound locks. Meanwhile, 53-year-old Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Bathes in Bleach/ Eats Plastic
programme.desc: Kailyn has eaten plastic every day for more than eleven years; Gloria has taken her addiction to bleach to the extreme by bathing in it daily.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Gas Sniffer/ Teddy Bear Obsession
programme.desc: For more than 30 years, Theresa has been addicted to smelling gasoline. Although she has battled cancer, anaemia and major stomach problems, she still cannot stop. Meanwhile, former drug-addict Krista has 12 'children,' all of which are teddy bears.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Identical Twin Obsession/ Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Forty-four year old twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the exact same size. Meanwhile, Jennifer has been addicted to eating mattresses for over 20 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Toilet Paper/ Blow Dryer
programme.desc: A woman admits to being addicted to eating half a roll of toilet paper a day.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: My Best Girls
programme.desc: One mother helps her son buy lingerie to spice up his sex life, while another crashes her son's Valentine's Day date.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Matt wants to spend Valentine's Day with his mom, while Shekeb disinvites his mom to date night. Justina's first steps toward wedding planning are overtaken by her future mother-in-law, Annette.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Don't Leave Me This Way
programme.desc: Emily reacts to Shekeb ditching her to tend to his mother. Stephanie finds herself struggling to win Liz's acceptance. Jason shares bad news with his mom.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Mother-Son Tango
programme.desc: Jason's mom has an odd request for their wedding dance. Mike defends Stephanie to his mother. Kelly intrudes on a romantic dinner between Matt and Kim, and Emily finds herself in the hot seat at Laila's birthday party.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: My Best Girls
programme.desc: One mother helps her son buy lingerie to spice up his sex life, while another crashes her son's Valentine's Day date.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Matt wants to spend Valentine's Day with his mom, while Shekeb disinvites his mom to date night. Justina's first steps toward wedding planning are overtaken by her future mother-in-law, Annette.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Don't Leave Me This Way
programme.desc: Emily reacts to Shekeb ditching her to tend to his mother. Stephanie finds herself struggling to win Liz's acceptance. Jason shares bad news with his mom.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Mother-Son Tango
programme.desc: Jason's mom has an odd request for their wedding dance. Mike defends Stephanie to his mother. Kelly intrudes on a romantic dinner between Matt and Kim, and Emily finds herself in the hot seat at Laila's birthday party.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Is It Crown-Worthy?
programme.desc: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Wanna Be Naked
programme.desc: Alexis wants to look naked on her wedding day, and Courtney's last-minute indecision puts Randy to the test.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Drama, Drama, Drama!
programme.desc: WyQuasia's family spends more time bickering with each other than listening to what the bride wants! Shelley's enormous entourage all have so many opinions they make dress shopping impossible. Bride Zabrina's mother demands her custom gown be redesigned.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sale Is on
programme.desc: Women come from all over the country for Kleinfeld's famous sample sale where they can buy gorgeous gowns at rock bottom prices. These brides have just three hours to sort through hundreds of designer options in the quest to find their dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Like Mother, Unlike Daughter
programme.desc: Valerie's budget is unlimited thanks to Dad, but Mom disagrees with her sexy dress choices. Bride Napiera wants a ball gown, but both her mother and former TV mom' think form fitting is best.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Situation in the Salon
programme.desc: Mike 'The Situation' Sorrentino arrives at Kleinfeld to help younger sister Melissa find her wedding gown, but he and his brothers keep stealing her spotlight. Meanwhile, bride-to-be Ashley is upstaged by her flower girl's custom-made Pnina dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Please Love My Dress
programme.desc: Marlene wants a feathered ball gown, but her parents prefer something traditional. Jessica loves every dress she tries on, but her family does not! Angelina likes a bohemian gown, but no one in her group is on board.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Vision Confusion
programme.desc: Lauren wants to look like a 'classy porn star' at her wedding, but she's in for a surprise. Bride Cheryl only knows what she does not want her wedding dress to look like. Bride Amanda hopes her custom gown lives up to the vision in her mind.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Brittany, who was always the bridesmaid but now the bride, wants to 'drop it low' in a dress. Veronica is determined to make her second wedding perfect. Erika bought her dress four years ago and is now ready to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: HuffPost Live correspondent and host Caitlyn Becker is torn between the first two dresses she tries on. Candace declares the first gown she wears is her dream dress. Fitting bride Danielle hopes she still loves the first dress she tried on and bought.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Francesca returns for a second visit, but her picky entourage may not let her choose the dress she loves. Brittany wants a non-traditional gown, but her mom is not on board. Samantha gets fitted for her reception dress, but the top is completely sheer.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'I'm a Firm Believer in Signs'
programme.desc: Bride Jenna is joined by her NFL player brother, Justin Pugh, who feels he's well-versed in fashion. Also, Talmesha wants a gown that will compliment a very special bouquet honoring her late father.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé - and his wife. Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the latest runway. Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Hell Nor High Water
programme.desc: Randy is in Louisiana to save bride Kelli's big day after she lost everything in a devastating flood. Social media star Claudia Oshrey, aka Girl With No Job, brings sass to her appointment. Pnina Tornai feels the heat during Bridal Fashion Week.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's a Horror Story
programme.desc: When Frank asked his girlfriend to move in, he wasn't expecting her to fill his house with clutter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's Out of Control
programme.desc: Extreme hoarding has put Kay's marriage in serious jeopardy; Toni's compulsive shopping has made her own home a danger zone.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Full of Rats
programme.desc: Property investors get more than they bargained for when the house they purchased is occupied by hoarder Michelle and a rat infestation so bad, it has compromised the building's foundation.

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Golden Krust Caribbean Bakery and Grill

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Build-a-Bear Workshop

programme.desc: The president and CEO of Taco Bueno, goes undercover to be certain everything at his company is 'bueno.'

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Budding entrepreneurs are given the chance to make their business dreams come true and become successful or even wealthy. But the entrepreneurs must first try to convince five tough, multi-millionaire tycoons to fund their ideas.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: The Anti-Villain League has recruited Gru to help deal with a powerful new super criminal.

programme.title: Movie: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: When the secret recipe for krabby patties goes missing, SpongeBob and the gang venture onto dry land to get it back. The scent leads them to a pirate with a magic book, and the ocean-dwellers must transform themselves into superheroes to take him down.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Thousand Pranks War: Part I
programme.desc: An ancient Prank War re-ignites between Swellview and Rivalton, and ShoutOut’s excellent sense for pranking is Danger Force’s best hope for winning the conflict.

programme.title: Side Hustle: Yard Sale
programme.desc: Needing money for this week's payment, the kids throw a yard sale. It's a success, but a miscommunication causes the toy that Lex stores their KidDING! money in to be sold. The kids have to find the buyer before Tedward comes to collect his payment.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 3
programme.desc: Tension on the ship rises as Elliott plants seeds of distrust about Will, whom Elliott suspects is collecting mission information for his reporter mother. Meanwhile, Samy works with Matilda’s inventor to probe the AI’s role in the accidental launch.

programme.title: Side Hustle: Vitamin Disaster
programme.desc: Lex and Presley get jobs as birthday party princesses after taking a vitamin that makes kids like vegetables. Only they end up playing princesses next to a vegetable garden.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Donor
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler search for the perfect male candidate who could inseminate Monica.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Barbados
programme.desc: When the gang goes to Barbados for Ross's palaeontology convention, the warm weather heats things up.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Is Fine
programme.desc: An uncomfortable Rachel, Joey and Charlie are invited by a drunken Ross to his apartment.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Tan
programme.desc: Rachel and Joey nervously anticipate their first real 'date;' Ross gets a spray-on tan, but fails to follow the simple directions properly.

programme.title: Mom: Night Swimmin' and An English Muffin
programme.desc: When Bonnie discovers Adam is still close with his ex-wife, Christy worries the emotional fallout could jeopardize Bonnie's sobriety.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Mom: Black Mold and An Old Hot Dog
programme.desc: Christy helps Jill adjust to being a new foster mother and Bonnie has trouble convincing tenants that she's a good building manager.

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie learn that she kept a very big secret.

programme.title: Mom: Tantric Sex and the Sprouted Flute
programme.desc: Christy annoys everyone when she adopts her new boyfriend Brad's healthy lifestyle, and Bonnie and Adam decide to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: With April's help, the Turtles find out that The Shredder has returned and has hired a scientist to create mutants of his own. Adding to their troubles, New York City is invaded by an extraterrestrial army. The Turtles face their toughest fight yet.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Fossil Frenzy
programme.desc: Nate makes a horrifying discovery and must rely on the wisdom of an ally to help him work through it.

programme.title: Movie: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: When the secret recipe for krabby patties goes missing, SpongeBob and the gang venture onto dry land to get it back. The scent leads them to a pirate with a magic book, and the ocean-dwellers must transform themselves into superheroes to take him down.

programme.title: Unleashed: A Little Birdie Told Us!
programme.desc: Impressive animal acts compete for the title of 'Most Entertaining Pet.'

programme.title: Top Elf: 'Tis the Season to be Top Elf
programme.desc: 'Elf-testants' compete in holiday-themed challenges to have their wish lists granted.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid Noir/ ScavengerPants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: The Loud House: Exchange of Heart/ Community Disservice
programme.desc: Clyde arranges for an exchange student to stay with them; Lola takes a timid classmate under her wing.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Reading the Road
programme.desc: An oversized load tests Jamie and his rebuilt wrecker HR-126, a gravel hauler ricochets off a rock wall leaving a twisted mess for Kelly and John and swamper Gord Lundin gets a chance to operate his own tow truck.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Snowbound
programme.desc: Jamie and his fleet of heavy wreckers are paralyzed in his own yard by a massive snowfall, a 'tow-up' in deep powder turns into big trouble for Colin and Al and Gord rescue a teetering semi during the morning rush on Hwy 1.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Junior's Job
programme.desc: Jamie's 13 year-old son gets a lesson in wreck recovery after a semi crashes down a 150-foot embankment, rock slides north of Hope trigger road closures and an explosive clean-up and Dylan puts on his hip waders to fish a truck out of a lake.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Metamorphic Layer of True Romanticism
programme.desc: Ivy takes it to the house in nearby Lancaster, while Dave takes advantage of being so close to Ivy. Meanwhile, Justin pushes all of Rene's buttons, and comes out ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Kumba-YUUUP!
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away, leaving them only scraps; Kenny uses Mary as a Dave shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Vegas Shrugged
programme.desc: In Placentia, the Ladies from Vegas try out their own bidding style. Brandi and Jarrod try to phone it in, while Kenny and his brother show everyone that family comes second.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Assassin's Greed
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes. Mary’s locker reveals a sticky past, while Justin shows that he can turn a small investment into a big return.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Fistful of Dollar
programme.desc: Emily is faced with an all-male day in Paramount. Justin seeks Ivy's guidance with his vintage Cadillac parts, while Kenny immediately regrets speaking up during the auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: One Girl's Trinket Is Another Man's Treasure
programme.desc: Back in Adelanto, Ivy records a hefty find. Brandi and Jarrod test the waters and it pays off big. Mary cranks up her profit to the sweet sound of success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buyerina
programme.desc: Back in Orange, Kenny tiptoes down memory lane. Brandi and Jarrod get to work on a tool locker, while Darrell and his granddaughter dig up a creepy find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Preaching to the Buyer

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Mo' Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: It's back to Moreno Valley, where Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up; Darrell's tubular locker tests out OK.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Whiskers and Lies

programme.desc: Ina Garten gives traditional Thanksgiving dinner dishes a modern twist. She trades the big bird for Tuscan turkey roulade and adds chipotle smashed sweet potatoes and pumpkin flan with maple caramel.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Thanksgiving, SoCal-Style
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves the ease of living and cooking in Southern California, and the Thanksgiving holiday is no exception. This year, she's treating her guests to a luscious, festive, Cali-style celebration.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Perfect as Pie
programme.desc: Ree Drummond proves that the pie's the limit with four irresistibly easy pie recipes. She makes a drunken pecan pie, a coconut cream pie with shortcuts, a cranberry and cherry cobbler pie and a super fast cast iron blueberry and nectarine galette.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 10 Things I Love About Ladd
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is spilling the beans on 10 things she loves about her husband, Ladd, and the food he loves most. There's spatchcock BBQ chicken with apple brown sugar BBQ sauce, and he can't resist thin and crispy waffle fries with sour cream and onion dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is exploring 16-minute marvels with four awesome weeknight dinners cooked against the clock. She makes pork schnitzel sandwiches topped with warm red cabbage followed by a snappy Italian sausage pasta skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling a fun, Thanksgiving-themed Q and A, where the answers include an awesome Thanksgiving breakfast casserole and pumpkin tiramisu, her favorite holiday dessert. She also serves up Nan's Cranberry Sauce.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Sides for Days
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is sharing her picks for crave-worthy, non-traditional side dishes for the holiday table. There's all the alliums fried rice, creamy polenta with crispy bacon and chard, classic macaroni salad and harissa-braised chickpeas with feta.

programme.title: Turkey Day Sunny's Way
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson celebrates Thanksgiving and being named the first guest editor of Food Network Magazine. She makes her grilled butterflied turkey with lemon pepper glaze and her crowdsourced stuffing.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Thanksgiving Sides 2.0
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her favorite Thanksgiving sides, including mushroom and leek bread pudding, homemade gravy and cranberry fruit conserve. Plus, Nigella Lawson, Chef Marcus Samuelsson and Jennifer Garner share their must-have Thanksgiving dishes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Leg Up on Turkey Day
programme.desc: The kitchen gets ready for Thanksgiving with dishes like Katie Lee's maple sage roasted turkey and Geoffrey's Hawaiian sweet roll stuffing. There's also sweet potato hummus on endive appetizers and maple sage roasted bourbon punch.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Season of Sharing

programme.desc: In the pre-heat, seven bakers must create a Thanksgiving dessert using a mystery canned fruit. Then in the main heat, bakers whip up new Turkey Day sensations by combining two traditional desserts.

programme.desc: When Alan ditches Gumball to do something more fun, Gumball is desperate to track him down and make him pay for his betrayal.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Night
programme.desc: As night falls in Elmore, the Moon takes us on a tour through the various dreams -- and nightmares -- of the town’s slumbering inhabitants. Each character's dream shows us their innermost desires, their greatest fears, or just how plain weird they are.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Advice
programme.desc: Mr. Small feels that he hasn’t inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Misunderstandings
programme.desc: Gumball thought he and Penny were meeting for dinner but they were actually meeting for lunch at a Diner called Dinner. He runs to the mall but everyone he meets on the way seems to misunderstand him in a different way.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signal
programme.desc: Gumball develops a strange stutter, and it makes him accidentally offend Darwin.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Roots
programme.desc: The Wattersons try and reconnect Darwin to his fish roots.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Blame
programme.desc: The Parent Teacher Association of Elmore Junior High ban video games, so the kids try and prove that games aren’t a bad influence.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stories
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin teach Molly how to be a better storyteller.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Code
programme.desc: When Mr. Small shows a health and safety video in class, Darwin becomes obsessed with the idea of keeping the Wattersons safe.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Test
programme.desc: Gumball is livid when an online test keeps telling him that his character-type is 'The Loser.' He’s convinced the only way to shake off this label is to do the opposite of everything he normally would.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Detective
programme.desc: Daisy the Donkey is missing, and Anais needs to follow the trail of clues to find her.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Boredom
programme.desc: The citizens of Elmore are feeling down because it’s January, so Gumball and Anais invent a new holiday called Sluzzle Tag.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fury
programme.desc: A mysterious figure from Nicole’s past shows up and challenges her to a fight, but the kids are surprised when she refuses.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Guy
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Compilation
programme.desc: The best of Elmore Stream.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Choices
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais discover that Banana Joe’s mom paints pictures which predict the future. When they find one that depicts Gumball running naked through the mall, Gumball is determined not to let it come to pass.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Disaster
programme.desc: Rob finally gains the power to destroy Gumball’s entire world.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Re-Run
programme.desc: Gumball tries anything he can to stop Rob from ruining his life.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Birds and the Frozen Bees
programme.desc: When D.J. reveals that he can bring frozen bees back to life, Jackie decides to conduct a few experiments of her own. Also, Darlene realizes that she's never stopped loving David.

programme.title: Roseanne: Couch Potatoes

programme.title: Roseanne: Shower the People You Love With Stuff

programme.title: Roseanne: Let Them Eat Junk

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: One False Move, Zimbabwe

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Slowly and in a Circular Fashion
programme.desc: When Walden's ex-wife and mother try to take control of his company, he tries to enlist Alan as an ally.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Possum on Chemo
programme.desc: Zoey tries to coerce Walden into cutting his hair and shaving. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey rekindle their relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Duchess of Dull-in-Sack
programme.desc: Walden tries to loosen Zoey up by sharing a couple of Berta's special brownies with her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sips, Sonnets and Sodomy
programme.desc: Strained relationships and a girl-fight result when a huge storm traps Walden, Alan, Zoey and Lyndsey in the house on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Not in My Mouth
programme.desc: Walden and Zoey's relationship suffers after a near-death experience. Meanwhile, Alan wonders if Lyndsey has a drinking problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The War Against Gingivitis
programme.desc: Things get tense in the Malibu house when Walden's estranged ex-business partner shows up looking to bury the hatchet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Palmdale, Ech
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey introduce their mothers to one another. Meanwhile, Jake and Eldridge ask Walden to drive them to a high school party.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Grandma's Pie
programme.desc: Walden breaks the news to Zoey that he is going into business with his ex-wife. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey try to come to terms with their moms' new relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Hose Says 'Yes'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Why We Gave Up Women
programme.desc: When Alan suffers a minor heart attack, Charlie's ghost pays a visit to his hospital bedside.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Straw in My Donut Hole
programme.desc: Alan is showered with love and affection upon returning from the hospital, but Zoey isn't so sure it's deserved.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Driving Reign

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Change of Heart/ Pants

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Love: A Cautionary Tale

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Tiny Soul Mate
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and Hector help 40 miniature Australian shepherds rescued from a puppy mill. Vet tech Christine turns to Dr. Jeff when her elderly Chihuahua has trouble walking. And Dr. Jeff is called out to treat an alpaca with a serious infection.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Frenchie with a Bump
programme.desc: Coco the Frenchie needs Dr. Jeff's help to remove a large lump from her face. Vet tech Christine faces her fear of birds while helping pigeons from Rocky Mountain Adventures, and Dr. Jeff and Baier aid a red-back turtle with an infected foot.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Gator Tale
programme.desc: An adventurous pup falls from a trampoline and it's up to Dr. Jeff and Petra to mend its broken leg. A dog called Pebbles must undergo emergency surgery for bladder stones, and Dr. Jeff also helps a young alligator with an injured tail.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Navigating a New Normal
programme.desc: In order to navigate the COVID-19 global pandemic, the staff must ensure proper care for their animals. Keepers spring into action when urgent dental surgery is needed for elderly tiger Binjai, and a family of cotton top tamarin monkeys must be relocated.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Goodbye for Now
programme.desc: When mama orangutan Sarkiei becomes sickly, keepers must separate her from prized son Tombol. Giraffe Dagmar becomes dangerously thin, keepers must determine whether or not to part her from calf Mburo, and the male giant otter pup goes on a hunger strike.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Gator Tale
programme.desc: An adventurous pup falls from a trampoline and it's up to Dr. Jeff and Petra to mend its broken leg. A dog called Pebbles must undergo emergency surgery for bladder stones, and Dr. Jeff also helps a young alligator with an injured tail.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Risky Business
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff must act fast to save a kitten with head trauma. Then Dr. Amy treats a dog whose weak heart makes surgery a risk. A good Samaritan helps a family when their pit bull is hit by a car. And Dr. Baier gets a workout trying to treat two wallabies.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Navigating a New Normal
programme.desc: In order to navigate the COVID-19 global pandemic, the staff must ensure proper care for their animals. Keepers spring into action when urgent dental surgery is needed for elderly tiger Binjai, and a family of cotton top tamarin monkeys must be relocated.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventurous Bear Cub
programme.desc: Andean bear Lima has a three-month-old cub, but keepers are concerned that her overprotective behaviour may curb its development. Later, when Lima's back is turned, cub Madidi embarks on an adventure into the paddock next door.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff operates on a dog rushed to the clinic after a growth on her neck ruptures. A family brings in their rabbit with mysterious growths on her side. The team performs a risky procedure on a pair of rescued miniature donkeys.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Long Way From Home
programme.desc: An owner drives nine hours to the clinic hoping Dr. Jeff can save her dog's leg. Jeff and his team head to a wildlife sanctuary to treat a pack of wolves. When a kitten with a deformed leg needs treatment, Dr. Baier steps up to the plate.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas treks to the summit of Mt. Washington to rescue an injured hiker. Then, officers track down a trio of possible deer poachers and Officer Ron Arsenault investigates a tip about an illegal bobcat trapper.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Out of Control
programme.desc: Episodes of the show with bonus content.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: On the Run
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Hannett pursues an unusual recreational vehicle in a high speed chase. Officer Pushee and Trainee Driscoll encounter a group of combative speedsters and Officer Lucas races to the scene of an ATV crash.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With added facts from the field, Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: Officers Hannett and Boudreau interrogate a group about lighting a fire in the woods. Officers Cheney and McKee confront a sly fisherman with a habit of lying. And officers discover a lobsterman who is banned from state waters breaking the law.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: A Rose Among Thorns

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Loaded Statement

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: But First, Coffee

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Mother Trucker

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Oh Brother!

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Get Off My Wig

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Kim Over Troubled Water

programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs

programme.desc: Max finally declares his independence from his parents' house rules and moves to his friend's house, where they only rule is that there are no rules. However, ultimate freedom quickly becomes more than Max can handle.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Max to the Future
programme.desc: Concerned that he isn't considered a valuable superhero, Max creates a machine that can predict future crimes, but when it doesn't work, he spins a web of lies to keep the truth from Phoebe.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Ditch Perfect

programme.title: Henry Danger: Balloons of Doom

programme.title: The American Game: Integration
programme.desc: As much as any other sport, the history of college football tells the history of American race relations. You can't appreciate the sport's complexities without knowing how long the road has been, and continues to be, towards equal rights.

programme.title: The American Game: Evolution
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: The American Game: Recruiting
programme.desc: Everything starts with the quality of the players that a school is able to recruit. Since college football's earliest days, recruiting has been one of the most critical and controversial aspects of the sport.

programme.title: The American Game: Bowls, Polls and Champions

programme.title: Movie: The Eagle
programme.desc: A Roman soldier is determined to honour his dead father's memory by retrieving a lost family emblem.

programme.title: Murder on Middle Beach
programme.desc: 'Murder On Middle Beach' examines first-time filmmaker Madison Hamburg’s complicated journey to solve the brutal 2010 murder of his mother, Barbara.

programme.title: Movie: Battleship
programme.desc: The fate of the Earth hangs in the balance as a fleet of naval ships are forced into a battle with an alien armada. Cut off from reinforcements, they must survive on wits and a strategic attack pattern if they are to survive.

programme.title: Between the World and Me
programme.desc: First published in 2015, 'Between the World and Me' was written by Ta-Nehisi Coates’ to his teenage son, and recounts the author’s experiences growing up in Baltimore’s inner city and the fear of violence against the Black community.

programme.title: Movie: Underwater
programme.desc: A deadly earthquake devastates an underwater drilling facility. To get to safety, the crew must walk across the ocean floor, under constant threat from their hostile environment.

programme.title: Between the World and Me
programme.desc: First published in 2015, 'Between the World and Me' was written by Ta-Nehisi Coates’ to his teenage son, and recounts the author’s experiences growing up in Baltimore’s inner city and the fear of violence against the Black community.

programme.title: The Undoing
programme.desc: A successful therapist's life is upended by terrible revelations about her spouse.

programme.title: Movie: High Fidelity
programme.desc: A recently dumped record store owner recounts his top five break-ups since childhood. Hoping to once and for all solve his relationship woes he decides to contact each one to determine why they left him.

programme.title: Movie: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget's jealousy starts to cramp her new love life with Mark Darcy. Soon, she begins to question not only her relationship, but her social circle and entire lifestyle as well.

programme.title: Flight of the Conchords: Live in London
programme.desc: Ten years after the debut of their critically-acclaimed HBO show musical comedians Bret McKenzie and Jemaine Clement return with an all-new comedy special, showcasing the duo's ability to mix humour and original songs.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: Beasts of the Southern Wild
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl leaves her hometown to search for her mother after her father's health crisis releases fictional creatures into the wild.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Not Insane
programme.desc: Learn about the work of Dr. Dorothy Otnow Lewis, a psychiatrist who examined the psychology of killers.

programme.title: Movie: Cowboys and Aliens
programme.desc: The Wild West and Outer Space collide when a spaceship lands with the intention of taking over the world in 1873. Sophisticated technology and human ingenuity clash as a group of cowboys and natives fight to thwart the aliens' plans of world domination.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: Point Break
programme.desc: Two FBI agents try to catch a ring of dangerous bank robbers who commit perfect robberies.

programme.title: The Best of All the Smoke with Matt Barnes and Stephen Jackson: NBA Draft Celebration
programme.desc: Superstars like Steph Curry and Vince Carter share their memories of achieving their NBA dreams.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: An archer returns home from the Crusades to find his father murdered and his lands taken over. He vows revenge against the Sheriff of Nottingham while training a band of outlaws in Sherwood Forest.

programme.title: The Reagans: The Hollywood Myth Machine
programme.desc: See how the ruthless rise of the corporate political right led Reagan to become an evangelist for small government.

programme.title: The Good Lord Bird: Last Words
programme.desc: John Brown and his remaining army take a last stand as more federal troops descend upon Harper's Ferry. With John Brown captured and held for public execution, Onion, truly on his own, risks his life to say his goodbyes to Brown.

programme.title: Movie: First Reformed
programme.desc: A pastor at a small rural church struggles with guilt over his son's death, an unidentified illness and his dwindling congregation, but when a pregnant woman asks him to help save her disturbed husband he discovers a way to solve all of his problems.

programme.title: Movie: The Gentlemen
programme.desc: An American expat in London unknowingly starts a gang war when he attempts to sell his highly profitable marijuana empire.

programme.title: Desus & Mero: DMFM: The Home of Boom Bap

programme.desc: Charlie Bucket lives in a tiny house with his parents and grandparents, and would like nothing more than to win a tour of Willy Wonka's chocolate factory. The adventure begins when he miraculously finds the last golden ticket in a chocolate bar.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 3
programme.desc: Two mismatched detectives travel to Paris to infiltrate an international crime syndicate.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour
programme.desc: A Hong Kong police inspector is paired with an L.A. detective to investigate a kidnapping.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 3
programme.desc: Two mismatched detectives travel to Paris to infiltrate an international crime syndicate.

programme.title: Martin: California, Here We Come
programme.desc: Martin is courted by television executives to host a national talk show based in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Martin: California, Here We Come
programme.desc: Martin is courted by television executives to host a national talk show based in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Martin: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Gina is angry when Martin makes insensitive remarks about women on his radio show.

programme.title: Martin: The Gift Rapper
programme.desc: Martin tries to find Gina the perfect anniversary gift.

programme.title: Martin: Things I Do for Love
programme.desc: Martin takes Gina out to a dance club for a romantic date.

programme.title: Martin: Boys R' Us
programme.desc: Martin tries to let everyone know that he wears the pants in his relationship.

programme.title: Living Single: The Last Temptation
programme.desc: A handsome young man from Synclaire's psychology class kisses her during a study session.

programme.title: Living Single: Legal Briefs
programme.desc: Maxine's new boss is an old flame.

programme.title: Living Single: Another Saturday Night
programme.desc: Kyle is asked to serve as escort to a beautiful princess who is doing business with him.

programme.title: Living Single: Who's Scooping Who?
programme.desc: Khadijah vies with a pompous reporter to break a story about a promoter who fixes fights.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love for New York
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony, they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash talking until Chamo delivers a 'New York Note.' The next challenge will test the guys on their earning potential; New York likes to spend money so she needs a man who can bring home the bacon.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys; it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build doghouses for NY's Chihuhua, Her Majesty. Some teams work together well but others fight.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She invites her friend Tamara Moore from the WNBA to put her men to the test and the best man wins a date with NY. One of the guys ends up in the hospital.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The six guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-olds run in the front door, it's a princess party.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining five guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: Movie: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: A woman offers stranded family a place to stay during a blizzard. Unbeknownst to her, they are members of a royal family. Despite their different backgrounds, the woman shows her guests what a small-town Christmas is all about.

programme.title: Movie: A Nashville Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A television producer is forced to work with the man who broke her heart on a country music Christmas special while being interrupted by Christmas spirits determined for her to revisit her past.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas House
programme.desc: When TV star Mike Mitchell's parents ask him to bring back a revered family tradition, he revisits the Mitchell family magic of Christmases past.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: The author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas
programme.desc: An ad executive and her uptight co-worker must create the ultimate Christmas commercial. To complicate things, they are also each-others Secret Santa.

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: Movie: Cherished Memories: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their second Christmas together, but, an unexpected guest, and a fight to save their town's community centre, ensures they have a Christmas they have never forget.

programme.title: Movie: A Cookie Cutter Christmas
programme.desc: Two long-time rival school teachers duke it out during the holidays in a bake-off. With both determined to win the prize, their competitiveness could jeopardize what matters most this Christmas season.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Rochelle Aytes and Mark Taylor from the Hallmark Channel original movie, 'A Christmas Tree Grows in Colorado.' Then, Vanessa Lengies and Corey Sevier discuss their movie 'Heart of the Holidays.'

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: A man moves his family back to his hometown so he can continue his childish antics with his best friends.

programme.title: Movie: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: A man moves his family back to his hometown so he can continue his childish antics with his best friends.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: Fishsticks
programme.desc: Cartman and Jimmy come up with the funniest joke of all time. When a humourless hip-hop star doesn't get the joke, he tries to bring justice to its creators.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: Six weeks after jumping bail in Galveston, Texas, Robert Durst is caught on a store security camera in Pennsylvania shoplifting a sandwich and is quickly sent back to Galveston to stand trial for the murder of his neighbor, Morris Black.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, a physician-turned-murderer left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next
programme.desc: Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed this once-trusted physician-turned-killer from hospital to hospital for nearly two decades and across two continents.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: I Don't Want to Die Today
programme.desc: Kilcher road is threatened by a dangerous flood and Otto must repair the vital road before it's washed away. Eve struggles to homeschool her kids, Jane and August score big on a deep-sea fishing trip and Atz Sr. recovers from his surgery.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: I Don't Want to Die Today
programme.desc: Otto makes emergency repairs to prevent Kilcher road from washing away in a flood while Eve struggles with homeschooling. Meanwhile, Jane and August score big while fishing and Atz Sr. recovers from surgery.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: We're Marooned
programme.desc: While transporting calves to the Head of the Bay by boat, Otto, Charlotte and August are marooned. Still struggling with PTSD, Atz Lee works with his son Etienne to finish the insulation on his backcountry build and Jewel visits the homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Dakota A-Frame
programme.desc: Jared 'Cappie' Capp showcases the luxury of off-grid living by building a modern home in the Black Hills of South Dakota. This stunning all-solar-powered abode will have a wood-burning fireplace, gourmet kitchen and a 400-square-foot loft.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: We're Marooned
programme.desc: While transporting calves to the Head of the Bay by boat, Otto, Charlotte and August are marooned. Still struggling with PTSD, Atz Lee works with his son Etienne to finish the insulation on his backcountry build and Jewel visits the homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Caddy Rust Bucket/ Bel-Air Beauty Part 1
programme.desc: Richard buys a nest of cars including a '68 Cadillac Coupe de Ville that is so rusted out that Aaron and the guys want to mutiny, but not until they have a little fun with it first.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Caddy Rust Bucket/ Bel-Air Beauty Part 2
programme.desc: Rust-ridden Caddy dumped, Richard gambles that the GMG crew can recoup his losses with a '60 Bel Air. Christie talks money: first with a dad who wants to punk his teenage son with a Yugo and then with Richard trying to convince him to hire his sister.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped Cabriolet and 'Vette Rescue
programme.desc: The crew helps a widow by buying her husband's Ford '32 Cabriolet and many hot rod projects. They rescue an heirloom '62 Corvette from a garage falling down around it, but not all the family is pleased Richard has it. Richard makes a big announcement.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Killer COPO Camaro
programme.desc: Richard gets his hands dirty building a $100,000 2013 COPO Camaro from the wheels up on the VIP assembly line. Aaron ignores his request to work on a newly arrived 1930 Model A and builds his own dream vehicle instead while the Monkeys tackle the A.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cool Customline
programme.desc: KC's beloved but broken down '55 Ford Customline gets new life and Richard needs to flip it to Shark Tank's Mark Cuban. George Foreman takes off with Richard's prize Mustang while Richard and Dennis haggle with a WWII vet over a '38 Aston Martin.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Troll's Choice Rolls-Royce
programme.desc: When Richard 'accidentally' buys $92K worth of cars at an auction, his bookkeeper sister insists he flip all five cars in one week. Some go more easily and profitably than others but it's a weirdly built Rolls Royce that even Aaron has a hard time fixing.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Aaron's Falcon Racecar
programme.desc: Aaron falls in love with and buys a famous '63 Ford Falcon race car off Richard, but will the original owner be impressed by Aaron's Gas Money style? Meanwhile, Richard flips a 1919 Nash and an unusually painted truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mustang Mania
programme.desc: Aaron chances the wrath of the Big Monkey when he overrides Richard's instructions on a Mustang Fastback. After picking up a 'Holy Grail' Boss 429 Mustang in Minnesota, Richard questions Dennis' decision to buy a rustbucket Jaguar E-Class buried in snow.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Jacked-Up Jeep
programme.desc: Aaron and the Gas Monkey crew overhaul a Jeep in 24 hours to surprise a friend. Richard flips a funky gull-winged Bricklin. Daphne convinces a reluctant Richard to hire his nephew. Dennis and Richard argue over how best to sell their COPO Camaros.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fleetline Superflip Frenzy
programme.desc: It's a gas monkey fire sale when Richard quick flips a menagerie of cars to make enough cash to buy back the first car he and Aaron built together 10 years ago. Richard and Dennis literally roll the dice on a 57 Chevy back in snowy Minnesota.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast Moving F100
programme.desc: Aaron's not impressed by the '72 Ford Pantera Richard picks up, but he and the Monkeys have fun bringing a Ford F100 truck back to life. Then, they head to Tennessee to try to buy back two pieces of Gas Monkey history: a ratrod and a panhead motorcycle.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: The Shorty Short VW Bus
programme.desc: When Richard buys a VW Microbus no one really knows the mechanics of this German car. Later, Richard and Aaron discover that the Fired Up garage is attending a demolition derby and Richard has a trick up his sleeve to send his former employees reeling.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My Biggest Embarrassment

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Sweethearts, Silenced
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts, and three other cold case murders, leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Night Shift

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Secret
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl goes missing in a small Kentucky town. Two weeks later, she is found strangled in the woods.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Officer Down
programme.desc: The longest running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark, who was shot execution style in his own home. It took 33 years to discover the truth.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Shannon Siders' body was found in the woods, nearly everyone in the small town of Newaygo, Michigan, becomes a suspect. It takes 22 years for a special cold case unit to solve the crime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Learn who was the most excited to film at Universal Studios and why the guys decided against posing as security guards. Plus, take a look at the exciting costumes the guys originally planned for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Suck to Suck
programme.desc: Find out which Joker has his own line of beer, and how often Joe has eaten garbage on camera. Plus, learn which famous entrepreneur spoke at the same conference as Murr.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Well...
programme.desc: Learn how the guys create rules for new challenges and which Jokers used to carpool to the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode
programme.desc: The guys hit the virtual nightclub with DJ Marshmello and Edie Falco. Joe sends the guys some bottle service.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Operation Hidden Roof

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cliff Face Crisis

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Moose in the City
programme.desc: A team is deployed to relocate a moose that has found its way into the city. During an undercover mission, Officer Egan encounters multiple violating bird hunters, while Officer Canfield rushes to rescue an injured hiker trapped on Mount Carrigain.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stubborn as a Moose
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski attempts every trick in the book to wrangle a stubborn moose off of a busy roadway. Officer Canfield plays a game of cat and mouse with a suspected illegal deer hunter, and Officer McKee and Demler investigate an illegal turkey kill.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Race Against the Sun

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Heart of the Wild

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hit the Ground Hunting

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Price of Freedom

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Two Kills

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Regrets

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunter Is Hunted
programme.desc: As moose season opens, the hunt is on to get meat to sustain them through winter. As Charlie looks for a kill, he realizes he's being stalked by a bear. Heimo takes Krin to his best moose territory. Tyler takes to the skies to assess the fire damage.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath
